name: @intentsolutionsio/claude-never-forgets
description: Persistent memory across sessions. Learns preferences, conventions, and corrections automatically.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install claude-never-forgets\\n  or /plugin install claude-never-forgets@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
